Body.Content:
We are announcing the ability to utilize the Sales Opportunity Agent to research opportunities owned by specific Owner teams in Dynamics 365 Sales. This feature will reach general availability on July 31, 2026.

How does this affect me?
As a seller, you will be able to see Sales Opportunity Agent research results for opportunities owned by Owner teams. As an admin, you can select a selection of criteria that encompasses opportunities that are not owned by individuals but rather owned by Owner teams.

What action do I need to take?
This message is for awareness, and no action is required.

Title: Dynamics 365 Sales - Teams owned opportunities to be researched by Sales Opportunity Agent
